name: iclic-inc/public-site-privacy
description: Hide public homepage and podcast pages, and redirect visitors to the admin gateway.

redirect_home_to_admin.label: Redirect homepage (/) to admin
redirect_home_to_admin.hint: When enabled, visiting / redirects to the admin gateway.

block_public_podcast_pages.label: Block public @podcast pages
block_public_podcast_pages.hint: When enabled, all public @handle routes (for example @myshow, @myshow/about, @myshow/episodes) redirect to admin.
